Dior 2025SS early autumn new dark pattern jacquard hooded jacket. Featuring hardware decorations provided by customers, the fabric is made of double-layer polyester composite fabric, which refers to a type of fabric created through special composite techniques. This fabric combines the comfort and breathability of cotton, and only after being composite can it restore the density texture of the fabric, making it silky, elastic, and jacquard. The jacquard technique creates patterns through the interweaving of warp and weft threads during the weaving process. A hidden hood and smooth zipper enhance functionality and style, complemented by concealed zip pockets for a sleek appearance and practical storage. The front showcases a subtle, luxurious diamond-shaped brand logo, while the back displays a bold "DIOR" stripe, a modern take on a classic element. Crafted from premium fabric, the vest is structured yet comfortable, breathable, and wrinkle-resistant, maintaining a crisp look. Perfect for layering or as a statement piece, it elevates any outfit. Available in sizes M to XXL.
